title: Claude 2026 Prompting and Claude Code Practice · Evaluation Brief: Claude Clarity Context
summary: Apply current Anthropic guidance to tool use, examples, context, and long-running coding. Planned artifact: Add and verify the prompt claude clarity context increment in a Claude-specific prompt and eval suite. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Use clear direct instructions, motivation, and relevant context for current Claude models.
Produce a handoff that another agent or human can continue without rediscovery.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
